title: Echomist: Fractured Skies
description: Adds Sylvite, a material focused around healing!
body:
![Echomist: Fractured Skies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8968d2645c04f1b46981342b1ac4f53a7ccb33b.png)

---
This mods adds a new material, Sylvite, which focused on a healing-oriented playstyle!

### Features
- Sylvite Shards: The main resource of the mod, grown with Budding Sylvite 
- Sylvite Halberd: Inflicts "Afflicted" on hit.
> Afflicted halves the target's healing efficiency.
- Sylvite Token: Combat / Utility item that heals the user.
- Budding Sylvite: Grows Sylvite Shards, see Gallery for a guide!
- Blocks
  - Sylvite Blocks (Including Stairs, Slabs and Walls)
  - Sylvite Bricks (Including Stairs, Slabs and Walls)
  - Sylvite Tiles (Including Stairs, Slabs and Walls)
  - Chiseled Sylvite
  - Sylvite Pillar

Sylvite Shards can also be used as armor trim materials!

---
### About Echomist

Echomist is an ongoing, work-in-progress mod series.
More is coming soon, development progress can be viewed on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/gRFRDhFn2p)!

This mod will not be ported to other mod loaders or versions, unless I am willing to do so.

Due to ARR licensing, you are not allowed to use any code / textures / other assets from this project. This is intentional, as I do not want my work to be used in any unrelated projects. Deciding against it, will result in me asking you to remove said assets from your project + further steps if the issue is not addressed. If you are really wanting to use certain assets, DM me on discord.

---
### Other Projects
[Echomist: Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/echomist) - Adds sculk blocks, Potions of Silence and a new trim material.

[Sharpened Axes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharpened-axes) - Slighly retextures all axes to be sharper.
